svg.title: Festival Analyzer System Architecture
svg.desc: Full stack architecture diagram showing data ingestion, backend, frontend, and external integrations for the music festival analyzer project.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Wikipedia scraper pipeline')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Spotify API integration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Apple Music API integration')
sendPrompt('Tell me about the Unsplash and social media feeds')
sendPrompt('How should I structure the Python ETL pipeline for this project?')
g.text: Scheduled ETL agents — Python scripts via GitHub Actions (cron)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why Supabase for this project and what tables should I design?')
sendPrompt('What artist data should I store?')
sendPrompt('What does the lineups table look like?')
sendPrompt('Should I use Supabase auto-API or build a FastAPI layer?')
sendPrompt('What FastAPI routes do I need for search and fun facts?')
sendPrompt('How do I handle the Spotify and Apple Music OAuth in the backend?')
sendPrompt('Walk me through the festival index page design')
sendPrompt('What should go on an individual festival page?')
sendPrompt('What should go on an artist detail page?')
sendPrompt('How should the fun facts generator work?')
sendPrompt('Compare Vercel vs Netlify for hosting this project')
sendPrompt('How do I set up GitHub Actions for the pipeline cron jobs?')
sendPrompt('What do I need to know about Supabase free tier limits?')

svg.text: Phase 1: Lollapalooza · Phase 2: Top 6 festivals · Phase 3: Full US festival list
